Headline: #72 North Temporary Eastbound Reroute near North Ave./Kolmar
ShortDescription: EB 72 North buses are temporarily rerouted via North Avenue, Cicero, Grand, North Avenue and over regular route, due to street blockage near North Ave./Kolmar.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #72 North buses are temporarily rerouted via North Avenue, Cicero, Grand, North Avenue and over regular route, due to street blockage near North Ave./Kolmar.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Yellow Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Board/exit all Yellow line trains on platforms # 1and #2 at the Howard station due to a track condition near the area of Howard.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?
Board/exit all Yellow line trains on platforms #1 and #2 at the Howard station.

Trains in both directions will operate via their normal routes resulting in minor delays.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include these buses:

  • #97 Skokie
  • #54A North Cicero/Skokie Blvd.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?
We are experiencing delays near the area of Howard due to a track condition.
